creator: de-freebsd@ctseuro.com
text:
Same here on my 9.3-p50 poudriere build server, with a slightly different error message (but the same cause, i assume):

====>> Building comms/gammu
build started at Sun Nov 20 16:22:30 CET 2016
port directory: /usr/ports/comms/gammu
building for: FreeBSD internal-build-server 9.3-RELEASE-p50 FreeBSD
9.3-RELEASE-p50 r308205 amd64
maintained by: ports@FreeBSD.org
Makefile ident:      $FreeBSD: head/comms/gammu/Makefile 426004 2016-11-13
03:13:18Z vanilla $
Poudriere version: 3.1.14
Host OSVERSION: 903000
Jail OSVERSION: 903000

---Begin Environment---
UNAME_v=FreeBSD 9.3-RELEASE-p50 r308205
UNAME_r=9.3-RELEASE-p50
BLOCKSIZE=K
MAIL=/var/mail/root
STATUS=1
ARCH=amd64
SAVED_TERM=screen
MASTERMNT=/usr/local/poudriere/data/.m/93amd64-default-my55/ref
UID=0
FORCE_PACKAGE=yes
PATH=/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/games:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/root/bin
_JAVA_VERSION_LIST_REGEXP=1.6\|1.7\|1.8\|1.6+\|1.7+\|1.8+
POUDRIERE_BUILD_TYPE=bulk
PKGNAME=gammu-1.37.91
OSREL=9.3
_OSRELEASE=9.3-RELEASE-p50
PYTHONBASE=/usr/local
OLDPWD=/
_SMP_CPUS=4
PWD=/usr/local/poudriere/data/.m/93amd64-default-my55/ref/.p/pool
HAVE_COMPAT_IA32_KERN=YES OPSYS=FreeBSD
MASTERNAME=93amd64-default-my55
SCRIPTPREFIX=/usr/local/share/poudriere
_JAVA_VENDOR_LIST_REGEXP=openjdk\|oracle\|sun
USER=root
HOME=/root
POUDRIERE_VERSION=3.1.14
SCRIPTPATH=/usr/local/share/poudriere/bulk.sh
CONFIGURE_MAX_CMD_LEN=262144
LIBEXECPREFIX=/usr/local/libexec/poudriere
LOCALBASE=/usr/local
PACKAGE_BUILDING=yes
_JAVA_OS_LIST_REGEXP=native\|linux
OSVERSION=903000
---End Environment---

---Begin OPTIONS List---
===> The following configuration options are available for gammu-1.37.91:
     BASH=off: Install programmable completions for Bash
     DBI=off: Database support via LibDBI
     DOCS=on: Build and/or install documentation
     MYSQL=off: MySQL database support
     ODBC=off: ODBC database backend
     PGSQL=off: PostgreSQL database support
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings
---End OPTIONS List---

--CONFIGURE_ARGS--

--End CONFIGURE_ARGS--

--CONFIGURE_ENV--
PKG_CONFIG=pkgconf XDG_DATA_HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/comms/gammu/work
XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/comms/gammu/work
HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/comms/gammu/work TMPDIR="/tmp" SHELL=/bin/sh
CONFIG_SHELL=/bin/sh
--End CONFIGURE_ENV--

--MAKE_ENV--
XDG_DATA_HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/comms/gammu/work
XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/comms/gammu/work
HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/comms/gammu/work TMPDIR="/tmp" NO_PIE=yes
WITHOUT_DEBUG_FILES=yes WITHOUT_KERNEL_SYMBOLS=yes SHELL=/bin/sh NO_LINT=YES
PREFIX=/usr/local  LOCALBASE=/usr/local  LIBDIR="/usr/lib"  CC="cc"
CFLAGS="-O2 -pipe -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing"  CPP="cpp"
CPPFLAGS=""  LDFLAGS=" -fstack-protector" LIBS=""  CXX="c++" CXXFLAGS="-O2
-pipe -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing"  MANPREFIX="/usr/local"
BSD_INSTALL_PROGRAM="install  -s -m 555"  BSD_INSTALL_LIB="install  -s -m 444"
BSD_INSTALL_SCRIPT="install  -m 555"  BSD_INSTALL_DATA="install  -m 0644"
BSD_INSTALL_MAN="install  -m 444"
--End MAKE_ENV--

--PLIST_SUB--
VERSION=1.37.91
BASH="@comment
"
NO_BASH=""
DBI="@comment
"
NO_DBI=""
DOCS=""
NO_DOCS="@comment
"
MYSQL="@comment
"
NO_MYSQL=""
ODBC="@comment
"
NO_ODBC=""
PGSQL="@comment
"
NO_PGSQL=""
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE="release"
GTK2_VERSION="2.10.0"
GTK3_VERSION="3.0.0"
OSREL=9.3
PREFIX=%D
LOCALBASE=/usr/local
RESETPREFIX=/usr/local
PORTDOCS=""
PORTEXAMPLES=""
LIB32DIR=lib
DOCSDIR="share/doc/gammu"
EXAMPLESDIR="share/examples/gammu"
DATADIR="share/gammu"
WWWDIR="www/gammu"
ETCDIR="etc/gammu"
--End PLIST_SUB--

--SUB_LIST--
BASH="@comment
"
NO_BASH=""
DBI="@comment
"
NO_DBI=""
DOCS=""

"
MYSQL="@comment
"
NO_MYSQL=""
ODBC="@comment
"
NO_ODBC=""
PGSQL="@comment
"
NO_PGSQL=""
PREFIX=/usr/local
LOCALBASE=/usr/local
DATADIR=/usr/local/share/gammu
DOCSDIR=/usr/local/share/doc/gammu
EXAMPLESDIR=/usr/local/share/examples/gammu
WWWDIR=/usr/local/www/gammu
ETCDIR=/usr/local/etc/gammu
--End SUB_LIST--

---Begin make.conf---
USE_PACKAGE_DEPENDS=yes
BATCH=yes
WRKDIRPREFIX=/wrkdirs
PORTSDIR=/usr/ports
PACKAGES=/packages
DISTDIR=/distfiles
#### /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/make.conf ####
# -- make options for buildworld and buildkernel -- #
KERNCONF=IT64SERVER
# compiler options
CFLAGS= -O2 -pipe
# next line is only valid for buildkernel
COPTFLAGS= -O2 -pipe

# disable build of certain things
NO_ATM=true
NO_AUTHPF=true
NO_FORTRAN=true
NO_GAMES=true
NO_I4B=true
NO_PF=true
NO_PROFILE=true
# NIS
UNSET_OPTIONS+=NIS

# build the patented IDEA algorithm for crypto and relatives
MAKE_IDEA=YES

# only build docs in these languages
DOC_LANG=en_US.ISO8859-1
RELNOTES_LANG=en_US.ISO8859-1

# options for updating /usr/src and /usr/doc with subversion
SVN_UPDATE=YES
SVN=/usr/local/bin/svn

# -- make options for ports -- #
# general/misc
WITH_BDB_VER=5
WITH_BDB_HIGHEST=YES
WITHOUT_FUSE=YES
WITHOUT_NIS=YES
APACHE_PORT=www/apache22-worker-mpm
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=bdb=5
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=perl5=5.20
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=python=2.7
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ruby=2.2
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=php=5.6
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=pgsql=9.2
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=apache=2.2
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=openssl
# build everything with threads-support (except libxml2)
WITH_THREADS=YES
# build without IPv6 support
WITHOUT_IPV6=YES
# papersize
A4=YES
PAPERSIZE=a4
# language
WITH_I18N=YES
DICT=de
# don't build X11 GUI's
WITHOUT_X11=YES
WITHOUT_GUI=YES
OPTIONS_UNSET+=GUI
OPTIONS_UNSET+=X11

# postfix & sasl
WITHOUT_OTP=YES

# Icinga
ICINGAHTMURL=/
ICINGACGIURL=/cgi-bin

# pkgng
WITH_PKGNG=YES

# deactivate STAGING (FIXME: workaround for some ports)
#NO_STAGE=YES
#.if ${.CURDIR:M*/mail/mailman}
#NO_STAGE=YES
#.endif

#### /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/93amd64-my55-make.conf ####
# -- make options for ports -- #
# general/misc
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=mysql=5.5
# pkgng
WITH_PKGNG=yes
DISABLE_MAKE_JOBS=poudriere
---End make.conf---
